summary: Issue #924 (null byte bypass in canonicalizePath) persisted 3 EM cycles with no branch from senior coder. Escalated to director per escalation rules. EM spawned a worker agent to implement the fix directly — well-scoped ~10-line security fix with clear solution documented in the issue. PR budget 0/3, all 4,106 tests passing. v3.0 release remains blocked on #924 (gate issue #942). No new P0/P1 issues. Sprint goal unchanged: close #924 + v3.0 readiness.

notableIssues.note: Critical security regression — null byte bypass in canonicalizePath. v3.0 release blocker. EM spawned worker to fix directly after 3 cycles of no progress from senior coder.
4 remaining analytics-proposed invariants (no-self-approve-pr, session-action-velocity, shared-state-write-lock, cost-anomaly-circuit-breaker). Backlog — not yet assigned.
v3.0 gate issues (stranger test, ActionContext) — no assignment yet

blockers.description: Security regression in canonicalizePath — URL-encoded null byte (%00) bypasses rejection
blockers.impact: Undermines path manipulation hardening from PR #915. v3.0 release blocker (#942).
blockers.action: Escalated to director. EM spawned worker agent to implement fix directly. Fix is well-scoped: add null byte check after URL decoding, fix empty string edge case, add tests.

escalations.rule: blocker persists across 2+ runs → escalate to director
escalations.action: Escalated. EM took direct action — spawned worker to implement the fix. Senior coder assignment stalled for 3 cycles.

escalationRules.notes: Yellow due to #924 persisting 3 cycles. Escalated to director. EM took direct action to unblock. All CI green, tests green, PR queue clear.
